theme: Hybrid (Dark/Moody Public Site, Clean Light Admin/Portal)

fonts.usage: Public site hero headings, major section titles. Evokes luxury and trust.
All dashboard UI, client portal text, body paragraphs, and buttons. Offers excellent Cyrillic support, high legibility.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium

public_site.grid: Bento Grid ('Tetris' mode), grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)
public_site.spacing: Generous (p-12, p-16, py-24). Allow the architectural images to breathe.

admin_and_portal.grid: Control Room Grid, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6)
admin_and_portal.spacing: Dense but clear (p-4, p-6). Every pixel utilized for data density.

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 or bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px delicate inner stroke). Navigation links MUST be visible on desktop.
surface_strategies.public_cards: The 'Tracing Beam' look for featured projects. High-conversion focus.
surface_strategies.dashboard_widgets: Crisp Neumorphism mix: Flat backgrounds (bg-white), sharp 1px border (border-slate-200), subtle shadow (shadow-sm). Do NOT overuse Shadcn Cards if going dense.

component_instructions.forms_and_inputs: ALWAYS use Shadcn Input, Select, Form components. NEVER use native <input>. Customize radii (max 8px) and borders to feel premium.
component_instructions.buttons: Explicit hover states required (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white). No generic default blue.
component_instructions.tables_and_data: Use Shadcn tables for Admin and Client portal. Ensure responsive scrolling. Left-align data, right-align numbers/currency.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., 'submit-reservation-button').

image_urls.description: Modern building exterior. Use for the public site hero section with a max bg-black/40 overlay to maintain visibility.
Contemporary architecture glass balconies. Use for the projects list or featured project card.
Modern living room. Use in the property detail gallery component.
Modern living room and kitchen setup. Use in the property detail gallery component.
Aerial view of residential complex. Use for the location/map context section.
Professional broker portrait. Use in the client portal contact widget.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the property status badge coloring and terminology (свободен, резервиран капаро 0, резервиран с капаро, предварителен договор, продаден).
Zero-deposit reservation flow is critical. Build a distinct modal/drawer for this with a countdown timer and clear UX.
Implement the UI in Bulgarian (Cyrillic) by default.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all interactive elements, e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='property-card-123'`.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for consistent, premium iconography.

The Public Site should feel like a luxury editorial piece (dark/moody sections, large typography, elegant spacing), while the Admin and Client Portal should prioritize clarity, data density, and trust (light theme, strict grids, high contrast).
